diagrams.title: Halting Problem Diagonalization Proof
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Turing's diagonalization argument for undecidability of Halting Problem
elements: Grid with rows as all TMs (M1,M2,...)
Diagonal entries show behavior of Mi on wi
Paradoxical machine D does opposite of diagonal
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the diagonalization proof technique used to prove Halting Problem undecidable
